items.title: 2 Market Media invoice due tomorrow
items.summary: $10,000 invoice for Discovery Deal Memo is due June 12. Contract has been signed and accounting has sent the invoice for bank transfer or other payment.
items.actionNeeded: Pay or approve the $10,000 invoice due June 12.

items.title: 2 Market Media launch call scheduled tomorrow
items.summary: Kick-off call scheduled for June 12 at 4pm EST (3pm local). No prep needed. Team will send contract for electronic signature and then invoice from accounting.
items.actionNeeded: Attend kick-off call tomorrow at 4pm EST via Zoom.

items.title: UPQODE SEO/AEO proposal clarifications provided
items.summary: Val clarified: Google Ads management fee excludes ad spend (recommend $1k/month minimum), content strategy allows you to write high-level vision pieces with UPQODE optimizing them, and AEO/GEO is a primary objective.
items.actionNeeded: Review clarifications and decide whether to approve proposal or schedule follow-up call.

items.title: VYVE & Influex AEO meeting today
items.summary: Meeting scheduled for June 11 at 10:30am with Angela Anderson from Influex regarding Answer Engine Optimization strategy.
items.actionNeeded: Attend or review outcomes from 10:30am meeting with Influex regarding AEO.

items.title: Patient guides printing on schedule
items.summary: AlphaGraphics confirmed 25 copies of VYVE Inner Health Guide are in production and will deliver Monday next week.
items.actionNeeded: No action needed; patient guides delivering Monday.

items.title: VoIP softphone setup in progress
items.summary: Kelly Wilson confirmed the new VoIP line order is processing. Login information and instructions for the Huddle softphone application will arrive by Friday.
items.actionNeeded: Wait for login credentials; no immediate action required.
